moon_lore: Tunya has a single visible moon. Moon hours per month always sum with sun hours to exactly 32. The split swings symmetrically around Vernal (16:16 equinox) and Pisces (14:18 lesser-balance) — the two equinox-analogues of the Tunyan year. Mercury-worshipping Medici tie major Choir resonances to these two balance points.
temperature_reference_latitude: equatorial belt — the Masond / Aekon / Bahiij band. Far-north lands (Dormas, Fluxom) run cooler by ~10-15°F; far-south lands run warmer by ~5-10°F. Highland districts (Sandrun's volcanic coast, Aekon's sky temple, Sahm's northern smiths above ~2500m elevation) can drop below freezing at night even in Halcyon. This is the only place 'frost biome' shows up on Tunya — there's no polar frost, only highland frost.
biome_note: earlier drafts of this bible listed 'frost' as a generic biome distributable across kingdoms. Canon corrects: frost on Tunya is elevation-driven only. The biome list in meta.json has been updated to highland_frost, which appears in mountainous districts of multiple kingdoms but not as a kingdom-wide climate.

seasons.label: Resurrection
seasons.narrative: The world wakes. Planting through sprouting through first-rain easing into mild weather. Years begin in Resurrection.

seasons.label: Drought
seasons.narrative: The unnamed-in-source mid-year season. Canon-locked here as Drought because Wound's 95-110°F dry heat anchors it. Festivals turn elemental — Halcyon (calm), Arbor (trees), Wound (wind). Dry roads favor land trade; sea trade slows in the heat. Cultural strain peaks in Wound — the Sanguire say people do dumb things in Wound, and they have records to prove it.

seasons.label: Harvest
seasons.narrative: Fattening through preservation through the actual harvest, then deep-sea fishing as the rains return. Most economic activity happens in Harvest.

seasons.label: Fallow
seasons.narrative: Salting, gleaning, slaughter, rest. The hibernation. Year closes with Cares — Love-the-Land celebration — observed by every kingdom on the same day.

months.name: T'Annum
months.cultural_notes: New annum celebrations. The year begins. Planet-wide.

months.name: Amity
months.cultural_notes: Friendship. Bonds, oaths, treaties. Akeia hosts its courtship ball this month — the diplomatic high-festival of the year.

months.name: Anew
months.cultural_notes: First sprouts. Agricultural milestone — the year's commitment becomes visible.

months.name: Vernal
months.cultural_notes: Mild weather. The first equinox-analogue (16:16 sun:moon split). Medici Choir holds a major resonance.

months.name: Ameliorate
months.cultural_notes: The Bettering. Weeding work, pest management, tariff reviews.

months.name: Halcyon
months.cultural_notes: Month of calm. Collective rest. Dormas hosts its high textile auction.

months.name: Arbor
months.cultural_notes: Celebration of trees. Nil opens its outer-grove silent walk for one day.

months.name: Wound
months.cultural_notes: Celebration of wind. Peak heat, peak strain. Sanguire clan duels traditionally held — heat sharpens the fights. Medici dispense water-bearing antidote pouches as a kindness; the practice is two generations old.

months.name: Batten
months.cultural_notes: Fattening. Only chicken, duck, fish, and chamois are butchered this month — larger livestock are fattened for Cull. Aekon audits its twelve districts.

months.name: Summery
months.cultural_notes: Celebration of sun. Bahiij hosts its summery lantern-night.

months.name: Preserve
months.cultural_notes: Preservation of food stuff. Sahm holds its smoke-fast — one day of fasting while the smokehouses run.

months.name: Harvest
months.cultural_notes: Harvest celebration. Aekon hosts its high feast — twelve districts, twelve dishes, the twelfth still secret. Cree hosts its Harvest market.

months.name: Fallow
months.cultural_notes: Season of deep-sea fishing. Fluxom historically peaks here — the sea creatures are quiet through Brine. The two families hold their fallow hearings to settle disputes.

months.name: Pisces
months.cultural_notes: Salting of fish for preserve. The lesser-balance moon point (14:18 sun:moon split). Fluxom attempts sea-trade reopens during the lull in sea-creature activity.

months.name: Brine
months.cultural_notes: Glean all fields and leave fallow. Nil holds its brine silent supper — outsiders welcome but cannot speak.

months.name: Cull
months.cultural_notes: Slaughter of animals. The most politically dangerous month. Sanguire warlord challenges are formally permitted. Succession crises tend to crack here.

months.name: Cares
months.cultural_notes: Love the land celebration. Year closes. The only festival every kingdom observes by the same name on the same day. Medici males uncover their heads in public ONLY on Cares-day-1 — the holiday communion of Mercury. Year-end audits, forgiveness rituals.

epoch.label: 4G
epoch.description: Year 4 of the fourth generation since first arrival. Approximately 96 Tunyan years since Africa landfall, 89 since Asbir/Cree disembarkation, 82 since Eurasia, 72 since Aekon's stranded arrival. Medici crash-landed approximately 100 Tunyan years ago — between the Asbir/Cree arrival (Year 7) and the Eurasia arrival (Year 14). The Medici crashed in Year 11.

religious_overlays_per_kingdom.policy: every kingdom observes the planet-wide calendar (sun, moon, temperature, and weather are environmental facts, not religious claims). Religious overlays are layered on top.

examples.medici: tie Vernal (16:16 balance) and Pisces (14:18 lesser balance) to major Choir resonances; Cares-day-1 is the holiday communion of Mercury.
examples.nil: Arbor silent walk and Brine silent supper are the only public observances.
examples.sanguire: Cull is when warlord challenges are formally permitted; Wound's wind-celebration carries pre-Tunyan Kree-origin invocations.
examples.aekon: Harvest high feast is the year's centerpiece. The twelfth district's dish is the twelfth-secret.
examples.bahiij: Lantern-night in Summery; elephant-procession in Vernal.
examples.asbir: follows the planet-wide calendar; the curated archive includes Earth liturgical references but no kingdom observes them publicly.
examples.sahm: Preserve smoke-fast is the kingdom's signature observance.
examples.dinye: every Cares is a full year-end accounting between the elder council and the seven villages.

festival_lore_hooks.amity_courtship_ball_akeia: Akeia's most consequential diplomatic event. Treaties drafted, marriages arranged, alliances tested. Foreign delegations attend at risk.
festival_lore_hooks.arbor_silent_walk_nil: Once a year Nil opens a single path through the outer grove. Walkers may walk it. None have ever asked to enter the inner grove. None have ever been refused, either, because none have asked.
festival_lore_hooks.harvest_high_feast_aekon: Twelve districts, twelve dishes. The twelfth district's dish has been the same recipe for four generations. No one outside the district will say what it is.
festival_lore_hooks.cull_sanguire_challenges: Sanguire clan warriors may formally challenge the warlord during Cull. Iyatte has accepted three challenges in her tenure. She has won three.
festival_lore_hooks.cares_medici_holiday_communion: The only day of the year Medici males uncover their heads in public. The Supreme Elder's cone is fully visible — a procession. Foreign witnesses may attend on the temple plaza but may not record.

open_lore_resolved_by_this_lock.frost_biome_origin: elevation-driven only — highland_frost. No polar frost on Tunya.
open_lore_resolved_by_this_lock.temperature_reference: equatorial belt; +/- 10-15°F for far-north / far-south kingdoms
open_lore_resolved_by_this_lock.religious_calendar_uniformity: the planet-wide calendar is uniform; religious overlays per kingdom layer on top
